untrustedWorkspaces.description: Security tools (nmap, Ghidra, Nuclei) are not available in untrusted workspaces because they can execute arbitrary shell commands against user-supplied targets.

kovix-security-tools.sandboxedTargetsOnl.description: When true (default), nmap and Nuclei scans are restricted to loopback and RFC1918 private ranges unless kovix.security.allowExternalTargets is explicitly enabled. This is the same external-target guard that existed before Phase 5; the setting is exposed here for visibility but the actual enforcement lives in the core registry.
